india_trends.title: Multibagger hunter Vijay Kedia buys 4.5% in SME Mahamaya Lifesciences; adds smallcap SPML Infra in Q4
india_trends.summary: Ace investor Vijay Kedia boosted his smallcap exposure in Q4 by acquiring 4.53% in Mahamaya Lifesciences and 1.88% in SPML Infra. Kedia, known for spotting multibaggers early, added these picks as both firms show improving momentum, aligning with his long-standing preference for SME and niche growth

india_trends.title: Milk supply, prices remain stable amid West Asia crisis; no disruption in dairy operations: Govt
india_trends.summary: "Milk procurement processing and supply across the country have remained uninterrupted amid the ongoing West Asia crisis. Price of milk and milk products are stable. No supply disruptions have occurred in the market and payments to dairy farmers have continued throughout the crisis period," said Rus

india_trends.title: Markets end near two-month high; Nifty retakes 24,500 as banks, FMCG lead - MSN
india_trends.summary: Markets end near two-month high; Nifty retakes 24,500 as banks, FMCG lead    MSN

india_trends.title: Nestle India shares jump 8% to new record high. What changed after Q4 results?
india_trends.summary: Nestle India shares surged over 8% to a record high after the company posted strong Q4 FY26 results, with net profit rising 27% YoY to Rs 1,111 crore and revenue up 23%. Robust volume growth, higher advertising spends, and strong performance across key brands boosted investor sentiment.

india_trends.title: Top Gainers & Losers on April 21: Nestle India, Groww, PNB Housing, Bank of Maharashtra, Sobha among top gainers
india_trends.summary: On April 21, the Indian stock market closed higher due to optimistic investor sentiment linked to potential peace talks involving Iran. The Nifty 50 and Sensex rose, with notable gains in FMCG, Realty, and Private Bank sectors, while Nifty Pharma lagged slightly.

india_trends.title: Nifty can rally to 30,089 in Prabhudas Lilladher’s bull case scenario, adds 3 stocks to model portfolio
india_trends.summary: Domestic brokerage Prabhudas Lilladher sees Nifty rallying 24% to 30,089 in a bull-case scenario, driven by strength in banks, capital goods and telecom. It added Polycab India, JSW Steel and Fortis Healthcare to its model portfolio, while cautioning on inflation risks and global uncertainties.

india_trends.title: Counterfeit Mounjaro case: Eli Lilly issues statement after Gurugram drug racket exposed
india_trends.summary: Gurugram's law enforcement has taken a bold step by breaking up a ring creating counterfeit Mounjaro injections, with two individuals now in custody for their role in the illicit trade of diabetes and obesity medications. The illicit enterprise involved importing raw materials from China and manufac

india_trends.title: Sensex jumps 753 points, Nifty 50 ends above 24,550; investors earn ₹3 lakh crore in a day; US-Iran peace talks in focus
india_trends.summary: The Sensex rose by 753 points, or 0.96%, to end at 79,273.33, while the Nifty 50 ended with a healthy gain of 212 points, or 0.87%, at 24,576.60.

india_trends.title: Sensex jumps 753 points, Nifty 50 ends above 24,550; investors earn ₹3 lakh crore in a day; US-Iran peace talks in focus - Mint
india_trends.summary: Sensex jumps 753 points, Nifty 50 ends above 24,550; investors earn ₹3 lakh crore in a day; US-Iran peace talks in focus    Mint

india_trends.title: China’s silver imports jump to record high. Is it time to buy silver?
india_trends.summary: China imported around 836 tons of silver in March, marking a record high driven by retail demand and the solar sector. This surge is significantly above the 10-year average of 306 tons, but high import levels may not be sustainable long-term.

india_trends.title: Delhi-NCR, Bengaluru office rentals cross Rs 100/sq ft/month milestone: Knight Frank
india_trends.summary: Office rental rates in Bengaluru and Delhi-NCR have now crossed Rs 100 per sq ft. This milestone is driven by strong demand for prime workspaces that outstrips available supply. Mumbai already sees rentals above this mark. Across eight major Indian cities, office rents saw a 2-15 percent annual incr

india_trends.title: A rush of price hikes at companies as margins take priority over volumes
india_trends.summary: From cement and paints to FMCG, companies are taking calibrated price hikes to offset crude-led cost pressures—but weak demand and inflation risks threaten the margin-volume balance.

india_trends.title: India should aim for 100% ethanol blending, says Nitin Gadkari
india_trends.summary: India aims for 100 percent ethanol blending soon. This move is crucial for energy self-reliance amid global oil market uncertainties. The country currently imports 87 percent of its oil. Efforts are underway to boost alternative and bio-fuel production. Green hydrogen is identified as a future fuel.

india_trends.title: US-Iran peace talks: Why could oil prices stay above $85/barrel even if Strait of Hormuz opens? Explained
india_trends.summary: Brokerages estimate crude oil prices to remain high even if the blockade at Strait of Hormuz opens. Domestic brokerages have pegged oil prices to average at $85 per barrel in the near term.

india_trends.title: PL Capital sees Nifty at 27,080; flags geopolitical risks, crude-led pressures
india_trends.summary: PL Capital said the impact of higher crude may be relatively contained compared to past shocks due to lower oil intensity of GDP
